## Installation

### HACS

1. Open HACS.
2. Navigate to Integrations.
3. Update Frank Energie.
4. Restart Home Assistant.

### Manual Installation

1. Download the release assets.
2. Replace the `custom_components/frank_energie` directory.
3. Restart Home Assistant.

## Support the Project

If Frank Energie has been useful to you, consider supporting its continued development:

* ⭐ Star the repository to help others discover the project: https://github.com/HiDiHo01/home-assistant-frank_energie
